subject: [PATCH 2/5] mm: memcg: simplify objcg charge size and stock remainder math

reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Acked the patch without raising any concerns or suggestions.
reviews.raw_body:
On Mon, Mar 02, 2026 at 02:50:15PM -0500, Johannes Weiner wrote:
> From: Johannes Weiner <jweiner@meta.com>
> 
> Use PAGE_ALIGN() and a more natural cache remainder calculation.
> 
> Signed-off-by: Johannes Weiner <hannes@cmpxchg.org>

Acked-by: Shakeel Butt <shakeel.butt@linux.dev>

reviews.author: Hao Li
reviews.summary: Approved the patch with a 'Nice rewrite!' comment, indicating they like the changes.
reviews.raw_body:
On Mon, Mar 02, 2026 at 02:50:15PM -0500, Johannes Weiner wrote:
> From: Johannes Weiner <jweiner@meta.com>
> 
> Use PAGE_ALIGN() and a more natural cache remainder calculation.
> 
> Signed-off-by: Johannes Weiner <hannes@cmpxchg.org>
> ---
>  mm/memcontrol.c | 16 ++++++----------
>  1 file changed, 6 insertions(+), 10 deletions(-)
> 

Nice rewrite!
Reviewed-by: Hao Li <hao.li@linux.dev>

reviews.author: Vlastimil Babka (SUSE)
reviews.summary: Approved the patch without raising any concerns or suggestions.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch series simplifies the object cgroup (objcg) charge size and stock remainder math in the mm/memcontrol.c file. The changes use PAGE_ALIGN() to calculate the charge size and a more natural cache remainder calculation.
